content_hash: 조성물, 녹용 추출액, 샤프란 추출물, 저분자 콜라겐 펩타이드 등이 포함됐다. 칼로리 부담을 낮춘 설계도 적용됐다. RXGIN 대표 제품 ‘RXGIN 홍천웅’은 홍삼농축액에 홍경천 추출물과 녹용, 구기자, 사상자, 복분자...
english_title: Cheong Kwan Jang: Sales of Hwa-ae-rak and RXGIN to 20-somethings rise during Family Month
english_summary: Chong Kun Dang reports increased purchases of its deer velvet-containing products Hwaaelak and RXGIN among consumers in their 20s during the Family Month promotional period. RXGIN Hongcheon Woong product combines red ginseng concentrate with deer velvet extract and other traditional ingredients in a low-calorie formulation.
